fn_declaraion.fn_code:
(*ares_sock_state_cb)(void *data,
                                   ares_socket_t socket_fd,
                                   int readable,
                                   int writable)

(*ares_callback)(void *arg,
                              int status,
                              int timeouts,
                              unsigned char *abuf,
                              int alen)

(*ares_host_callback)(void *arg,
                                   int status,
                                   int timeouts,
                                   struct hostent *hostent)

(*ares_nameinfo_callback)(void *arg,
                                       int status,
                                       int timeouts,
                                       char *node,
                                       char *service)

(*ares_addrinfo_callback)(void *arg,
                                   int status,
                                   int timeouts,
                                   struct ares_addrinfo *res)

ares_library_init_mem(int flags,
                                       void *(*amalloc)(size_t size),
                                       void (*afree)(void *ptr),
                                       void *(*arealloc)(void *ptr, size_t size))

ares_set_local_ip6(ares_channel channel,
                                     const unsigned char* local_ip6)
(*arecvfrom)(ares_socket_t, void *, size_t, int, struct sockaddr *, ares_socklen_t *, void *)

ares_send(ares_channel channel,
                            const unsigned char *qbuf,
                            int qlen,
                            ares_callback callback,
                            void *arg)

ares_query(ares_channel channel,
                             const char *name,
                             int dnsclass,
                             int type,
                             ares_callback callback,
                             void *arg)

ares_search(ares_channel channel,
                              const char *name,
                              int dnsclass,
                              int type,
                              ares_callback callback,
                              void *arg)

ares_gethostbyname(ares_channel channel,
                                     const char *name,
                                     int family,
                                     ares_host_callback callback,
                                     void *arg)

ares_gethostbyname_file(ares_channel channel,
                                         const char *name,
                                         int family,
                                         struct hostent **host)

ares_gethostbyaddr(ares_channel channel,
                                     const void *addr,
                                     int addrlen,
                                     int family,
                                     ares_host_callback callback,
                                     void *arg)

ares_getnameinfo(ares_channel channel,
                                   const struct sockaddr *sa,
                                   ares_socklen_t salen,
                                   int flags,
                                   ares_nameinfo_callback callback,
                                   void *arg)

ares_timeout(ares_channel channel,
                                          struct timeval *maxtv,
                                          struct timeval *tv)

ares_process_fd(ares_channel channel,
                                  ares_socket_t read_fd,
                                  ares_socket_t write_fd)

ares_create_query(const char *name,
                                   int dnsclass,
                                   int type,
                                   unsigned short id,
                                   int rd,
                                   unsigned char **buf,
                                   int *buflen,
                                   int max_udp_size)

ares_mkquery(const char *name,
                              int dnsclass,
                              int type,
                              unsigned short id,
                              int rd,
                              unsigned char **buf,
                              int *buflen)

ares_expand_name(const unsigned char *encoded,
                                  const unsigned char *abuf,
                                  int alen,
                                  char **s,
                                  long *enclen)

ares_expand_string(const unsigned char *encoded,
                                    const unsigned char *abuf,
                                    int alen,
                                    unsigned char **s,
                                    long *enclen)

ares_parse_a_reply(const unsigned char *abuf,

                                    struct hostent **host,

                                    int *naddrttls)

ares_parse_aaaa_reply(const unsigned char *abuf,

ares_parse_caa_reply(const unsigned char* abuf,

ares_parse_ptr_reply(const unsigned char *abuf,

                                      int addrlen,
                                      int family,
                                      struct hostent **host)

ares_parse_ns_reply(const unsigned char *abuf,

ares_parse_srv_reply(const unsigned char* abuf,

ares_parse_mx_reply(const unsigned char* abuf,

ares_parse_txt_reply(const unsigned char* abuf,

ares_parse_txt_reply_ext(const unsigned char* abuf,

ares_parse_naptr_reply(const unsigned char* abuf,

ares_parse_soa_reply(const unsigned char* abuf,

				      struct ares_soa_reply** soa_out)

ares_parse_uri_reply(const unsigned char* abuf,

ares_inet_ntop(int af, const void *src, char *dst,
